label: Admin / Plant Library
items: Plant Library — Gemini cascade now includes the full 2.5 range alongside the 3.x models. Order: 3.1-flash-lite → 2.5-flash-lite → 2.5-flash → 3-flash-preview → 2.5-pro → 3.1-pro-preview. Six models × three retries = up to eighteen attempts per batch before the cascade gives up.

Plant Library — paused the daily verify cron to focus on populating the database first. The verify edge function is still deployed and admin-triggered runs from /admin/plant-library work the same; only the 04:00 UTC auto-schedule is off. Re-enable when ready.
